title: Whitefield IT Park Laptop Theft
description: 34 laptops stolen from an IT company office on the 6th floor of a Whitefield tech park over a weekend. Access card cloned to enter the building. Internal office door forced. Theft targeted only high-spec developer machines, suggesting prior knowledge of asset locations.
modus_operandi: Cloned access card, weekend timing, forced internal door, selective high-value theft, inside knowledge of machine locations.

suspects.description: Male, seen in building on Friday evening, wore company branded cap

evidence.description: Access card log showed cloned card entry at 11:40 PM Saturday
Lift camera captured suspect with trolley bag exiting at midnight
Stolen laptop IMEIs flagged on dark web resale forum within 5 days

blind_spots: Access card clone not flagged by IT security until day 3
Former employee list not cross-checked until day 6
Dark web monitoring not initiated until day 5
resolution: Former employee with access card knowledge identified. Arrested day 12. Laptops recovered from Hosur storage.
